name: The Bed Worm
description:
🪱 || You've bought a pet 'worm' off the Dark Web || 🪱
|| This so-called worm is really a parasite that likes to live within the human body ||

|| Based off of a video on Youtube made by LuxuryDark ||

|| Content warning (?) : Talks about the Dark Web, introduces a parasitic worm that will most likely enter your body, probably will get detailed and/or disturbing. ||

|| Majorly regret making this (yes still), but oh well! ||
